short_extract_or_paraphrase: Made by human skill and not natural; can also mean imitation or not real; can also mean forced or false.
relevance_to_chart4b: Core boundary term with a made branch and a fake adjacent branch
notes: Best compact modern entry for Chart 4B.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Made by art in opposition to natural; also feigned fictitious and not genuine.
relevance_to_chart4b: Shows the split between not natural and not genuine is old and explicit

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Not true real or genuine; counterfeit or sham; something passed off as what it is not.
relevance_to_chart4b: Strong contrast term because deception and non genuineness are central

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Not true; deceptive; not genuine; sometimes an artificial substitute such as false teeth.
relevance_to_chart4b: Shows overlap with artificial on substitute uses but broader truth and error senses

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Made in imitation of something else with intent to deceive.
relevance_to_chart4b: Important fake basin anchor because deception is built in

short_extract_or_paraphrase: A fraud or pretended thing; false or counterfeit; to make a false show.
relevance_to_chart4b: Useful for the feigned and affected edge of artificial

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Formed through chemical process by human agency rather than natural origin; can also mean false or pretended.
relevance_to_chart4b: Strong material and industrial neighbor to artificial
notes: Closer in additives and materials than in sincerity contexts.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: A copy or counterfeit; designed to imitate a genuine or superior article.
relevance_to_chart4b: Useful substitute and copy branch without requiring fraud in every case
Shows why simulated can touch the fake basin in appearance contexts
notes: Need more non dictionary context for broader technical uses.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Accurately representing what is natural or real; convincingly rendered to appear natural.
relevance_to_chart4b: Bridge term that can modify artificial things without making them real
notes: Crucial for the realistic versus real distinction.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Actual or genuine; not counterfeit artificial or imitation.
relevance_to_chart4b: Strong contrast anchor to artificial and fake alike
notes: More existential and authenticity loaded than realistic.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Real and possessing the claimed origin or character; not counterfeit; sincere.
relevance_to_chart4b: Strong contrast anchor on both object authenticity and sincerity
notes: Helps separate authentic feeling from artificial manners.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Not false or imitation; real or actual; also trustworthy or true to an original.
relevance_to_chart4b: Useful contrast term with extra authority and provenance weight

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Existing in or formed by nature and not by humans; also spontaneous and unaffected; minimally processed in food.
relevance_to_chart4b: Strong contrast field for artificial across material and behavioral uses

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Built or formed by putting parts together.
relevance_to_chart4b: Neutral made branch near the core of artificial

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Made or produced by hand or machinery on a large scale; can also mean made up.
relevance_to_chart4b: Industrial neighbor that can drift toward contrived in some figurative uses

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Subjected to a special process or treatment in the course of manufacture.
relevance_to_chart4b: Consumer and additive neighbor rather than a fake synonym
notes: Closer to industrial handling than to deception.

short_extract_or_paraphrase: Secondary chronology lists made by art; imitation or substitute; affected or insincere; fictitious or not genuine.
relevance_to_chart4b: Supports the historical branching logic for basin drift
notes: Use as chronology pointer not final dating proof.
